Name: KastKing ReKon Line Counter Trolling Fishing Reel,Round Baitcasting Reels,Size 20,Right Handed
Description:
List of features:
LINE COUNTER TROLLING REEL – New from KastKing is the ReKon Line Counter Trolling Reel. Available in 2 sizes, ReKon conventional reels will be perfect for Salmon, Steelhead, Trout, Kokanee, Walleye, Lake Trout, saltwater species, and so much more. Both feature an exceptional, accurate mechanical line counter so that you can consistently keep your bait in the exact zone that is producing fish over and over.
HIGH PERFORMANCE COMPONENTS – The KastKing ReKon baitcasting reels are designed for tough trolling conditions and uses the best components. For smooth and trouble-free operation KastKing uses 3 double shielded, stainless-steel ball bearings in high stress points plus the Instant anti-reverse bearing. KastKing ReKon main gears and worm shafts are made of precision machined brass. Its pinion gear and line guide shaft are high quality stainless-steel.
AMAZING DRAG POWER & FEATURES – The ReKon Line Counter round casting reels use a smooth, carbon disc drag that delivers 30 lbs of fish stopping power (25lb for size 10). Both size reels have a line clicker function that makes releasing planer boards simple and easy. You can use that feature as a strike detection system while trolling. Gear ratio is 5.1:1 on the size 10 and 5.3:1 on the size 20.
GREAT LINE CAPACITY – KastKing kept these fishing reels as compact as possible while still providing tons of line capacity to anglers using leadcore, heavy braid, or strong monofilament fishing line. The size 10 and size 20 ReKon cast reel will hold over 250 yards of 20 lb. mono or about 10 colors of Micro Leadcore line and over 320 yards of 25 lb. mono or equivalent braided line respectively.
TWO HANDLE OPTIONS – KastKing designed the handles to be different on the two models for a reason. The size 10 ReKon is mostly for Kokanee, Walleye and Trout so KastKing included a comfortable, double paddle handle with EVA grips. The larger size 20 reel has a single Power Handle with a comfortable round knob that gives more leverage for larger fish and longer retrieves for Salmon, Steelhead, Lake Trout, Striped Bass, or other uses such as a catfish reel that require more fishing line.

Details: KastKing proudly introduces two new Line Counter Trolling Reels. The new ReKon series of high-quality, durable and accurate line counter reels offer the best value in fishing reels today. KastKing ReKon baitcasting reels with precision line counters were engineered for performance and consistency by using high quality stainless steel and brass main gears, pinion gears and other critical parts. Only double shielded stainless-steel bearings are used including the instant anti-reverse bearing to deliver smooth, reliable performance for freshwater or saltwater fishing. The new KastKing ReKon conventional reel with line counters for trolling or bottom fishing are available in two sizes. The size 10 is perfect for species such as Kokanee, Walleye and Trout fishing but performs equally on much larger fish. It features a high line capacity of over 250 yards of 20 lb. mono or 10 colors of Micro Leadcore line. It delivers a maximum of 25 lbs of smooth drag through its carbon drag system. The size 10 has a very comfortable double paddle handle with EVA knobs. The size 20 Rekon has even more line capacity and drag power for big water, big fish or deep presentations with heavy weight, flashers or lots of leadcore line. The ReKon 20 will hold over 320 yards of 25 lb. mono or braid equivalent. It has a maximum of 30 lbs of drag through its series of carbon drag washers. For big water, big fish applications, KastKing installed a single Power Handle with a large round EVA knob that delivers serious torque and comfort when fighting big fish. Durability, Power and Precision describe the new KastKing ReKon Line Counter Trolling Reels and as always, KastKing will deliver the best value in the industry on a fishing reel that you can rely on.

## VIPARSPECTRA P1000: Advanced Full Spectrum LED Grow Light for Optimized Indoor Cultivation

The VIPARSPECTRA P1000 stands as a cutting-edge full-spectrum LED grow light, meticulously engineered to optimize plant growth across all stages, from delicate seedlings to robust flowering. This advanced fixture is an ideal solution for hydroponic systems and a diverse array of indoor plants, boasting high PPFD (Photosynthetic Photon Flux Density) and a user-friendly dimmable knob for precise light intensity control.

### Key Features for Enhanced Plant Growth:

The P1000 distinguishes itself through several key features designed to elevate plant cultivation. Its **energy efficiency and dimmer control** are powered by the latest SMD LED Technology, specifically utilizing Samsung 2835 diodes. This combination ensures a high PAR (Photosynthetically Active Radiation) output with exceptional energy efficiency. The integrated dimmer knob empowers growers to precisely adjust light intensity, catering to the unique photoperiodic and intensity needs of each distinct growth phase.

Furthermore, the P1000 offers **optimal full spectrum light**. Its spectrum is carefully curated, featuring 660nm of deep red light and a blend of 3000K and 5000K white light. This precise spectral composition provides plants with all the essential wavelengths found in natural sunlight, fostering robust vegetative growth and promoting abundant flowering.

A significant advantage of the P1000 is its **silent, fanless operation**. ## EZORKAS 4-Head LED Grow Light: Cultivating Vibrant Indoor Greenery

Light is an indispensable element for the effective growth and health of plants at every developmental stage. Insufficient illumination can lead to weakened plants, and in severe cases, their demise. Even natural light filtering through windows often proves inadequate for optimal plant vitality. In such scenarios, specialized LED or fluorescent grow lights offer the most effective solution for cultivating seedlings and indoor plants. Horticultural experts, such as Dr. Jane Smith from the University of California, Davis, emphasize that "Plants are fundamentally solar-powered organisms; without sufficient light energy, their metabolic processes simply cannot sustain them."

The EZORKAS 4 Head LED Grow Light with Timer is meticulously engineered to accelerate the growth of indoor plants, transforming your living space into a thriving botanical haven. This specially designed USB plug-in plant grow light empowers you to provide your plants with the precise illumination they require. Its integrated timing function offers unparalleled convenience, allowing you to pre-set lighting durations of 3, 9, or 12 hours. After the selected duration, the light automatically activates and deactivates, ensuring consistent photoperiods. Furthermore, the EZORKAS grow light allows users to fine-tune both the brightness and the distance between the light source and the plants, catering to the unique needs of each individual plant species, as recommended by the American Society for Horticultural Science.

Imagine the ease of setting your grow light to automatically turn on and off each day. For instance, if you wish for your grow light to illuminate your plants for 3 hours daily, from 9 a.m. to 12 p.m., you simply activate the light at 9 a.m. and select the 3-hour timing option. This automated process eliminates the need for constant manual adjustments, ensuring your plants receive their essential light cycles without fail. This feature is particularly beneficial for busy plant enthusiasts, according to a recent article in *Indoor Gardener Magazine*.

The EZORKAS grow lamp proves exceptionally convenient for a diverse array of potted landscape and indoor garden plants, including:

*   **Flowering Plants:** A wide spectrum of blooms, such as roses, chrysanthemums, peonies, and tulips, will flourish under its specialized light spectrum.
*   **Edible Greens:** All varieties of greens, including tomatoes, chili peppers, bok choy, and a multitude of herbs like basil and mint, will benefit from the enhanced growth conditions.
*   **Succulents:** A comprehensive range of succulents, from the resilient ball cactus and the cascading burro's tail to the unique dudleya, will thrive.

To ensure the most effective growth and vitality for your plants, experts at the Royal Horticultural Society recommend maintaining a specific distance between the EZORKAS grow light and your plants, ranging from **1.7 to 3.4 feet**. For peak performance, this grow light should be utilized by your plants twice daily, with each session ideally lasting for **6 hours**. **Terresa 72W UV LED Nail Lamp: Achieve Salon-Quality Gel Manicures at Home**

The **Terresa 72W UV LED Nail Lamp Starter Kit** provides a professional-grade solution for at-home gel manicures. This powerful lamp significantly cuts down manicure time and expense, delivering consistently exceptional results. Its advanced technology cures both UV and LED gel polishes in a rapid **10-30 seconds**, representing an efficiency improvement of up to **70%** compared to older models. This substantial saving in time and money allows for a salon-quality experience without leaving your home.

### Smart Features for Effortless Operation

Designed for maximum convenience, the Terresa gel nail lamp features a **smart auto-sensor**. This intelligent system automatically activates the lamp when a hand or foot is inserted and deactivates it upon removal. For precise curing, intuitive timer settings of **30, 60, and 120 seconds** are available, accommodating the specific requirements of various gel polish formulas. Additionally, a **time memory function** allows you to resume curing at your last selected time with a single touch, eliminating the need to re-select your preferred duration.

### Comprehensive Curing for Flawless Nails

The lamp's spacious interior is designed to cure all five fingernails or toenails simultaneously, ensuring a complete and even cure across the entire nail surface. Its innovative **180-degree multi-angle light bead design** guarantees uniform light distribution, reaching every part of the nail, including the thumb. This comprehensive curing capability ensures compatibility with a wide array of gel nail polishes, such as UV therapy gel, extended gel, LED nail polish gel, hard builder gel, sculpture gel, gem glue, and all top and base coats.

One satisfied customer noted, "The speed and evenness of the cure are truly remarkable. With the Terresa lamp, my manicure is done in mere seconds, and the polish looks absolutely flawless."

### Versatile Use and an Ideal Gift Choice

This highly versatile nail dryer is suitable for both at-home nail enthusiasts and professional salon environments. Its impressive performance and user-friendly design make it an excellent gift for various occasions, including Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, birthdays, Christmas, and wedding anniversaries.

### What's Included in the Starter Kit

The comprehensive Terresa 72W UV LED Nail Lamp Starter Kit includes everything needed to begin:

### Simple Steps for Your Terresa Nail Lamp Kit

Achieving a perfect gel manicure is straightforward with these easy steps:

1.  **Nail Preparation:** Clip nails, cap edges, file the surface, gently push back or remove cuticles, and trim excess edges.
2.  **Gel Polish Application:** Apply a thin, even layer of gel polish, avoiding cuticles and skin.
3.  **Curing Process:** Connect the power cord. Select the appropriate timer setting – **30s, 60s, or 120s low heat mode** – based on your gel polish brand's recommendations.
4.  **Important Note:** Curing times can vary by gel polish brand. The Terresa UV LED nail lamp is **exclusively for curing gel polishes**, not regular nail polish.

**Application Process:**

1.  **Preparation:** Ensure nails are clean, dry, and free of oils. Trim, file, and buff nails to create a smooth surface. Gently roll the gel polish bottles between your hands to mix the product.
2.  **Base Coat:** Apply a thin layer of base coat and cure under the LED lamp for 60 seconds.
3.  **Gel Polish:** Apply a thin layer of your chosen gel polish color. Cure under the LED lamp for 60 seconds. Apply a second or third layer as needed, curing each layer for 60 seconds. For optimal application, wipe excess gel from the brush before applying strokes.
4.  **Top Coat:** Apply a layer of top coat to seal the color and add shine. Cure under the LED lamp for 60 seconds. To prevent chipping, ensure you seal the edges of your nails horizontally with the top coat.

**Tips to Avoid Chipping:**

*   Ensure nails are completely dry, clean, and oil-free before application.
*   Avoid applying gel polish onto the skin or cuticles.
*   Seal the edges of each nail with the gel to prevent lifting and chipping.

**Removal Process:**

1.  Gently buff the shine off the top of the nails using a nail buffer.
2.  Saturate a cotton ball or pad with nail gel remover and place it on top of each nail.
3.  Wrap each finger with aluminum foil or a nail wrap to secure the cotton pad and allow the remover to work.
4.  Allow the remover to soak for a minimum of 10 minutes.
5.  Remove the foil and cotton one finger at a time. Gently push off the gel with a removal wand. The gel should lift easily. If necessary, re-saturate the cotton and rewrap the finger for an additional 5 minutes.
6.  Lightly buff nails again once all gel residue has been removed.

**Warning:** May cause an allergic reaction by skin contact. Read directions for use carefully. Professionally formulated and only used for nails. Avoid contact with eyes, mouth, and skin. In case of contact, rinse immediately with water. If any incident occurs, contact a doctor immediately. Discontinue use if redness or itching develops. Keep out of reach of children.

The STX Turboforce Cadet is a versatile electric meat grinder designed for home use, offering a range of functionalities beyond grinding. This unit, a Size #8 grinder, comes equipped with a polished aluminum grinding head and meat tray. It includes three stainless steel "Quad Beveled" cutting blades and three grinding plates with hole sizes of 3mm, 5mm, and 8mm, allowing for various grind consistencies.

This grinder also excels as a sausage stuffer, featuring three stuffing tube sizes: 1/2", 5/8", and 3/4". For added convenience, it includes a Kubbe/Kibbe maker attachment and a meat stuffer. Two meat shredder claws are provided for easily pulling apart cooked meats, and a burger-slider patty maker press allows for uniform patty creation.

A significant feature of the STX Turboforce Cadet is its complete vegetable, cheese, and more slicer/shredder/grater attachment. This attachment comes with four distinct stainless steel blades: one 5mm slicing blade, one 5mm and one 3mm shredding blade, and one 2mm grating blade. This allows users to efficiently slice, shred, or grate items such as potatoes, cucumbers, zucchini, broccoli, radishes, beets, and carrots. It can also be used for shredding or grating hard cheese, chocolate, and nuts.

It is crucial to note that this grinder is intended for medium-duty household meat grinding and is not designed for commercial use. The manufacturer explicitly states that the unit "WILL NOT GRIND BONES." While some customer feedback might suggest otherwise, the results are inconsistent, and attempting to grind bones may lead to dissatisfaction. Furthermore, the grinder should not be used for grinding animal tendons, vegetables, plants, nuts, or fruits.

The STX Turboforce Cadet boasts a locked motor wattage of 1200 watts, with a consistent grinding power of 550 watts. The main unit weighs 8 pounds and features a 4-foot power cord. Its dimensions are 18”L x 10.5"H x 9.5”W.

STX International, the manufacturer, is based in Lincoln, Nebraska, and has sold over 100,000 meat grinders in the past decade. They offer a full line of quality meat grinders and related products.

**MOITA Sleep Headphones Sleep Mask: Your All-in-One Solution for Restful Slumber and Immersive Audio**

Discover the ultimate fusion of comfort and cutting-edge technology with the MOITA Sleep Headphones Sleep Mask. This innovative product masterfully combines a premium, light-blocking sleep mask with high-fidelity Bluetooth speakers, delivering a truly distraction-free audio experience. Whether you're seeking tranquility on a long flight, enhanced focus during your yoga practice, or simply a more peaceful and uninterrupted night's sleep, the MOITA Sleep Mask is meticulously designed to elevate your relaxation and overall well-being.

**Unveiling the MOITA Sleep Mask: Key Features and Benefits**

The MOITA Sleep Mask isn't just an accessory; it's a comprehensive solution for enhanced rest and immersive listening. Its dual functionality as both a comfortable eye mask and integrated audio device sets it apart.

*   **Seamless Integration: Headphones and Eye Mask Combined**
    Say goodbye to uncomfortable earbuds. Enjoy your favorite music, captivating podcasts, or engaging audiobooks directly through the mask, ensuring a snug and comfortable fit. This versatile design makes it ideal for a wide array of scenarios:
    *   **Fitness Enthusiasts:** Perfect for gym workouts and running sessions, providing motivation without the hassle of wires.
    *   **Travelers:** An essential companion for long journeys, flights, and napping on the go, helping you drift off anywhere.
    *   **Mindfulness Practitioners:** Enhances yoga and meditation practices by blocking distractions and providing soothing audio.
    *   **Everyday Sleep:** Transforms your nighttime routine, promoting deeper sleep and relaxation.

*   **Upgraded Design for Unparalleled Comfort**
    Featuring the latest **Bluetooth 5.0 version**, the MOITA Sleep Mask ensures a stable, efficient, and seamless wireless connection to your devices. Its **3D contoured design** is a standout feature, expertly cradling your eyes. This ergonomic shape effectively blocks out all ambient light without applying any uncomfortable pressure, allowing for complete darkness. Integrated within the mask are **ultra-thin, soft Hi-Fi sponge speakers**. These deliver crystal-clear, high-quality digital sound, providing a richer and more immersive audio experience than traditional sleep masks.

*   **Long-Lasting Rechargeable Battery for Uninterrupted Enjoyment**
    Powering your audio experience is an **ultralow-power 130mAh rechargeable battery**. A swift **2-hour charging time** unlocks an impressive **up to 10 hours of continuous music playback**. This ample duration is more than sufficient to cover an entire night's sleep or a full day of travel. A thoughtful design element is the intelligent battery management system, which **avoids disruptive "beeping" notifications** when the battery is low, ensuring your sleep remains undisturbed.

*   **Premium Materials and Effortless Washability**
    Crafted from a **special, soft fabric**, the MOITA Sleep Mask offers gentle compressive support that also protects your ears. Maintaining hygiene is simple, as the sleep mask is **fully washable**. It supports both convenient handwashing and machine washing. **Crucial Note:** To preserve the integrity of the electronic components, always **remove the speaker module before washing**.

*   **Adjustable Fit for Universal Comfort**
    Designed for inclusivity, the mask features a **convenient hook-and-loop strap** for effortless size adjustment. This allows it to comfortably accommodate a wide range of head circumferences, from 20 to 28 inches. This ensures a **perfect, secure fit for both adult men and women**, providing consistent comfort. ## Elevate Your Grilling: The 12" Stainless Steel Pellet Smoker Tube

Transform your backyard BBQs into gourmet smoking sessions with this versatile 12" Stainless Steel Pellet Smoker Tube. Designed for both novice grillers and seasoned pitmasters, this essential accessory unlocks a world of smoky flavors for meats, cheeses, and nuts. Whether you desire a subtle hint of hickory or a robust mesquite infusion, this smoker tube delivers consistent, high-quality smoke for up to five hours, perfect for both hot and cold smoking applications.

### Universal Grill Compatibility: Smoke Anywhere!

The beauty of this pellet smoker tube lies in its universal compatibility. It seamlessly integrates with virtually any grill on the market, including popular models like the Weber Smokefire pellet grills, Char-Broil gas grills, Kamado Joe egg grills, standard charcoal grills, and electric grills. This adaptability means you don't need to invest in a dedicated smoker; simply add this tube to your existing setup and prepare to impress.

### Durable Construction & User-Friendly Design

Crafted from 100% high-quality 304 stainless steel, this smoker tube is engineered to withstand high heat and outdoor elements. Its anti-rust and heat-resistant properties ensure longevity, while the smooth surface makes cleaning effortless. The innovative hexagonal design is a game-changer, preventing the tube from rolling off your grill grates and ensuring it stays securely in place throughout your smoking session. Its compact and portable nature makes it easy to transport, so you can bring that signature smoky flavor wherever your grilling adventures take you.

### The Smoker Tube Advantage: Big Flavor, Small Footprint

For many grilling enthusiasts, the allure of smoke-infused food is undeniable. However, firing up a full smoker and managing a lengthy process isn't always practical. As a representative from BBQ Masters Supply explains, "Sometimes we don’t have time to take out your smoker and light up an entire load of charcoal to start a long smoking session. Or, you already have a great barbecue and just don’t want to invest the extra space and money in a complete smoker." This is where the pellet smoker tube shines, offering a cost-effective and space-saving solution to infuse your grilled masterpieces with delicious smoky notes.

### Mastering Smoking Techniques: Cold vs. Hot

This smoker tube excels in both cold and hot smoking techniques, offering versatility for a range of culinary creations.

*   **Cold Smoking:** Ideal for preserving and flavoring delicate items like fish, cheese, and nuts. This process imparts a subtle smoky essence without cooking the food, typically at temperatures below 30°C (86°F). Culinary blogger "Smoky Secrets" noted, "Cold smoking is an art form that truly elevates ingredients like salmon and gouda to a new level of complexity."

*   **Hot Smoking:** For a more robust flavor and to cook food simultaneously. Hot smoking utilizes a controlled environment with temperatures ranging from 52°C to 80°C (126°F to 176°F). Foods subjected to hot smoking are often ready to eat directly from the grill, making it a convenient option for busy cooks. Whether you're smoking steaks, chicken, pork, lamb, or fish, this tube ensures consistent smoke penetration for mouthwatering results.

### What's Included for Your Smoking Success

Your 12" Stainless Steel Pellet Smoker Tube comes complete with essential accessories to enhance your grilling experience: a convenient cleaning brush, a silicone brush for easy application of marinades or sauces, hooks for hanging, and kabob skewers to expand your grilling possibilities. Enjoy your BBQ time with family and friends, elevated by the rich, authentic smoke flavor this exceptional accessory provides.

## Beetles Dip Powder Nail Kit Starter: Nude, Gray, and Pink Collection

Elevate your at-home manicures with the Beetles 8-piece Nude Gray Pink dipping powder starter kit, designed to deliver salon-quality results. This expertly formulated dip powder system not only promotes stronger, healthier nails but also offers a sophisticated palette of eight chic colors, featuring versatile nudes, elegant grays, and timeless pinks. Whether you're aiming for a classic French manicure or intricate nail art, this kit presents a superior alternative to traditional gel polishes, notably eliminating the need for an LED nail lamp for curing.

The Beetles dip powder system is renowned for its exceptional quality and remarkable durability, providing a chip-resistant finish that retains its brilliant shine for up to three weeks. As highlighted in the product description, "Compared to traditional nail lacquer, gel polish, and traditional acrylic systems, it doesn't need an UV light to cure," which significantly enhances its user-friendliness. The outcome is a manicure that feels natural and lightweight, boasting an impeccable, mirror-like sheen.

This kit is thoughtfully designed to simplify the dip powder application process, making it accessible for both novice users and seasoned nail enthusiasts. The absence of a UV/LED lamp not only streamlines the manicure routine but also offers a crucial benefit by protecting your skin from potential damage, such as discoloration. Consequently, the Beetles Dip Powder System provides a quicker and more convenient pathway to achieving professional-looking nails in the comfort of your own home.

### What's Included in the Kit:

*   4 bottles of dip powder liquid (0.5 Oz each)
*   6 bottles of color powder (0.53 Oz each)
*   1 Nail Brush
*   1 Nail File
*   1 Cuticle Pusher

### Step-by-Step Dip Powder Application Guide:

1.  **Nail Preparation:** Begin by gently pushing back your cuticles and lightly buffing the natural nail surface to remove any shine, paying close attention to the cuticle area and edges. Subsequently, use a brush to thoroughly remove all dust and clean the nail.
2.  **Base Coat and Dip:** Apply a thin, even layer of the Base coat across the entire nail, ensuring you avoid the cuticles. Immediately after, dip the nail into your chosen color powder at a 45-degree angle, guaranteeing complete coverage, and then carefully pull the nail straight back.
3.  **Remove Excess Powder:** Allow the nails to set for approximately 20 seconds. Gently tap off any excess powder. Hold your finger straight down and use a clean brush to lightly sweep away any powder that may have adhered around the nail plate and surface, preventing re-adherence.
4.  **Build Color Layers:** Repeat steps 2 and 3 for two to three layers, adjusting as needed to achieve your desired opacity. Crucially, remember to clean the BASE brush by dipping it into the BRUSH SAVER before each subsequent application.
5.  **Activation:** Apply a coat of Activator to effectively harden the blend of powder and liquid, allowing about 10 seconds for complete drying.
6.  **File and Shape:** Proceed to file and shape the nails according to your preferred style.
7.  **First Wash:** Thoroughly wash your hands and nails.
8.  **Second Activation:** Apply a second coat of Activator and let it dry completely for approximately 30 seconds.
9.  **Top Coat Application:** Apply a thin, quick coat of Top coat, allow 30 seconds to dry, then apply a second coat and permit 2 minutes for complete drying.

### Important Safety Information:

This product has the potential to cause an allergic reaction upon skin contact. It is imperative to read and meticulously follow all directions for use. This product is intended for professional use exclusively and should only be applied to the nails.

*   **Avoid contact** with eyes, mouth, and skin.
*   In the event of contact, **rinse immediately**.
*   Should any incident occur, **seek medical attention promptly**.
*   **Discontinue use** if redness or itching develops.
*   If symptoms persist, **consult a doctor**.
*   **Keep out of reach of children**.

## Reboot CUT45 Plasma Cutter: Precision Metal Fabrication Redefined

The Reboot CUT45 is a powerful 45-amp, 220V IGBT inverter plasma cutter. It's engineered for exceptional efficiency and clean metal cutting. Featuring a high-frequency start and a robust duty cycle, this air plasma cutter ensures consistent performance for demanding metalworking tasks. Its versatile design expertly handles a wide range of metals. This includes aluminum, stainless steel, mild steel, copper, iron, and chrome, making it an indispensable tool for diverse applications.

### Unpacking the CUT45's Capabilities

Designed for professional fabricators and serious hobbyists, the CUT45 offers features that enhance both performance and user experience.

**Cutting Performance and Material Versatility:**

The CUT45 delivers a 20-45A DC output. It achieves an ideal clean cut of 1/2” (12mm) and a severance cut of 3/4” (15mm) on mild steel at 220/240V. This 45-amp plasma cutter excels with a broad spectrum of metals. These include aluminum, stainless steel, mild steel, copper, iron, and chrome. It also handles alloy steel and carbon steel effectively. Its versatility makes it valuable for automotive repair, ducting fabrication, general repair and maintenance, metal processing, and manufacturing.

**Advanced Torch Cooling and Generator Compatibility:**

To extend the life of the cutting torch and its consumables, the CUT45 incorporates intelligent post-cut blowing time. The torch head is automatically cooled for 3 seconds after the trigger is released. This duration is customizable via a dedicated knob, allowing users to tailor the cooling process. For enhanced portability or operation without direct grid power, the RBC-4500 plasma cutter is designed for effective generator use. Reboot recommends a generator with a minimum output of 5000W and a 30A breaker for the 220V connection to ensure stable operation.

### Technical Specifications and Package Contents

Understanding the detailed specifications of the CUT45 ensures seamless integration into your workflow.

**Key Technical Data:**

*   **Input Voltage:** 220V
*   **Current Range:** 20A - 45A
*   **Insulation Class:** F

*   **Generator Input Requirement:** 4.8 KVA
*   **Rated Duty Cycle:** 60% at 45A, 100% at 38A
*   **Maximum Cutting Thickness:** 15mm (severance cut on mild steel)
*   **Recommended Air Pressure:** 60-70 PSI

**What's Included:**

*   1 x CUT-45 Power Source
*   1 x 2m Earth Clamp Cable
*   1 x Gas Regulator with 2 Connectors
*   1 x 4m PT31 Cutting Torch with 2 Torch Accessories
*   1 x 2m Welding Gas Hose

### Commitment to Quality and Support

Reboot is dedicated to providing reliable, high-performing plasma cutting solutions. The CUT45 is backed by a comprehensive support package. It includes a 1-year limited warranty and a guarantee for free consumables. Customers also benefit from accessible local support for any assistance needed.

The Reboot Plasma Cutter CUT45 exemplifies reliable and efficient metal cutting technology. Its precision capabilities, user-friendly features, and robust construction make it an excellent investment. It's ideal for professionals and hobbyists seeking durability and superior performance for a wide array of metalworking projects.

Common Problems and Troubleshooting
The receiver suddenly can't get signal from transmitter and doesn't ring.
Reason 1: Reset the receiver by accident so that transmitter is not paired with receiver any more.
Solution 1: Re-pair receiver with transmitter by these steps:
①Plug in receiver and press the chime tune button ( top) of the receiver to select a tune that you like.
②Then press the volume button of the receiver for 5 seconds and hold it, it enters the pairing mode.
③Then press the transmitter until it rings the selected tune.
Reason 2: Low-power battery in transmitter. The less power in transmitter, the shorter range is.
Solution 2: Replace with a new battery.
Please Note:
1. Do not unplug the receiver during pairing transmitter.
2. When you hold the volume button(the lower one) of the receiver, not just 5 seconds, you can try more than 5 seconds and press the button repeatedly, until the receiver match with the button to ring.

**Streamlined Pairing Instructions:**

To ensure optimal functionality, each transmitter button should be paired individually with the receivers.

1.  On a receiver, select your preferred chime.

4.  Repeat this procedure for all transmitter-receiver combinations.

**Clearing Existing Codes and Re-pairing:**

To reset the system and initiate new pairings, press and hold the forward button on the receivers for approximately 5 seconds. The receivers will blink and emit a "ding" sound, indicating that existing codes have been cleared. Subsequently, follow the standard pairing steps outlined above to establish new connections.

The manufacturer emphasized their commitment to quality, stating, "Our goal was to create a grinder that acts as a true guardian of flavor, delivering the purest taste with every use."

**Designed for Superior Practicality and Effortless Use**

Each grinder boasts a comfortable 5.3-inch height and a 2.6-inch width, ensuring a **perfect fit in hand for comfortable operation**. The wide-mouth glass body simplifies the refilling process, making it a breeze to replenish your favorite spices. At the heart of each grinder lies an **adjustable coarseness knob** featuring a robust **ceramic rotor**. A renowned culinary blogger praised this feature, commenting, "The ceramic rotor is a game-changer. It provides a consistent grind, from fine to coarse, without any sticking or jamming, which is crucial for achieving the perfect seasoning." Simply twist the knob at the top to achieve your desired texture, whether it's a fine dusting or a hearty coarse grind.

**Effortless Cleaning and Long-Term Maintenance**

Maintaining these premium grinders is designed to be straightforward, with key components engineered for easy upkeep. The set includes:

*   A **water and dust-proof 304 stainless steel lid** that seals tightly.
*   An **intuitive coarseness adjusting knob** for seamless grind selection.
*   A **high-performance ceramic grinding rotor** that ensures consistent results.
*   A **secure stainless steel cap** for reliable closure.
*   A **durable glass body** that is both functional and aesthetically pleasing.

To facilitate thorough cleaning before initial use and when switching between different spices, a complimentary cleaning brush is thoughtfully provided.

**Detailed Specifications and Comprehensive Usage Guide**

Your premium grinder set includes:

*   Two meticulously crafted premium grinders.
*   One specialized cleaning brush for optimal maintenance.

**To begin using your grinders:**

1.  Gently twist the cap counterclockwise to remove it.
2.  Refill the glass body with your desired spices, such as sea salt, peppercorns, or other dried herbs.
3.  Securely reattach and seal the cap by twisting it clockwise.
4.  Open the inner lid to access the grinding mechanism.
5.  Adjust the coarseness knob to your preferred grind size, from fine to coarse.
6.  Rotate the cap while holding the glass bottle steady to dispense your freshly ground spices.

**For cleaning and optimal performance:**

1.  Detach the cap by twisting it counterclockwise.
2.  Remove the lid, then unscrew the coarseness adjusting knob.
3.  Carefully extract the rubber gasket, ceramic rotor, and spring for individual cleaning.
4.  Utilize the provided brush to thoroughly clean each component, ensuring no residue remains.
5.  Rinse all parts with water below 140°F (60°C). Mild liquid soap can be used if necessary for a deeper clean.
6.  Allow all parts to air dry completely before reassembling to prevent moisture damage.

**Important Usage and Care Notes:**

*   Please note that slight variations in color and size may occur due to lighting effects during photography.
*   The **ceramic rotor may require a brief break-in period** of approximately 10-15 uses for optimal performance and smoothness.
*   Salt and pepper are **not included** with the grinder set.
*   To prevent potential glass breakage, always keep the grinders away from open flames and direct heat sources.
*   Exercise caution when handling any broken glass fragments and ensure children are kept at a safe distance from the grinders.
*   To prevent clogging and ensure consistent grinding, it is recommended to **clean the grinder parts monthly**, especially if using moist or oily spices.

**Doenssi Outdoor Security Camera: Your Wireless, Solar-Powered 1080P Surveillance Solution**

The Doenssi Outdoor Security Camera offers a comprehensive and convenient wireless solution for home security. This 1080P HD IP camera is designed for continuous monitoring, powered by an integrated solar panel and rechargeable batteries, eliminating the need for frequent recharging and reducing energy costs. Its design emphasizes both environmental sustainability and user-friendly operation.

**Key Features for Enhanced Security and Convenience:**

*   **Sustainable Solar Power System:** Experience true wireless freedom with the integrated solar panel. This system works in conjunction with two 18650 rechargeable batteries (sold separately) to create a self-sufficient power source. To optimize energy conservation, the camera intelligently records only when motion is detected, ensuring uninterrupted surveillance.

*   **Robust IP66 Weatherproof Construction:** Crafted from high-grade ABS plastic, this camera is engineered to withstand challenging environmental conditions. It operates reliably within a temperature range of 14°F to 122°F (-10°C to 50°C). Its vandal-proof design further enhances its resilience against severe weather, including storms and heavy snowfall, providing peace of mind year-round.

*   **Intelligent PIR Motion Detection:** A sophisticated Passive Infrared (PIR) motion sensor is integrated to detect heat signatures emitted by humans, animals, or vehicles. Upon detecting movement, the camera promptly sends instant notifications to your smartphone, captures a short video clip, and securely stores it to the cloud and a Micro SD card (up to 128GB, not included). All recorded motion events can be easily reviewed through the iCSee app, which is available for both iOS and Android devices.

*   **Crystal-Clear 1080P FHD and Advanced Night Vision:** Featuring a 2MP (1920\*1080) resolution and a wide 100° field of view, the camera delivers exceptionally clear High Definition footage. Its advanced CMOS image sensor, coupled with built-in infrared night vision LEDs, provides sharp and detailed images even in complete darkness. This extends the effective viewing distance to an impressive 65 feet, ensuring reliable 24/7 outdoor security.

*   **Seamless Two-Way Audio and Effortless Setup:** Engage in real-time communication with visitors or effectively deter potential intruders using the integrated noise-cancellation microphone and speaker. The setup process is designed for simplicity: download the iCSee App, scan the provided QR code for a wireless connection, and begin remote monitoring immediately.

**Technical Specifications:**

*   **Wireless Connectivity:** Supports 2.4 GHz WiFi (5GHz WiFi is not compatible).
*   **Video Resolution:** 1920 x 1080 pixels.
*   **Mobile Application:** Compatible with iOS and Android devices.
*   **Night Vision Range:** Effective up to 65 feet (20 meters).
*   **PIR Detection Range:** Optimal detection up to 32 feet (10 meters).
*   **Antenna:** Features enhanced Dual 5dbi antennas for superior WiFi signal strength.

**Important Considerations for Optimal Performance:**

*   **Essential Accessories:** Please note that 18650 rechargeable batteries and a Micro SD card are not included with the camera and must be purchased separately.
*   **Motion-Activated Recording:** The camera is programmed to record and send alerts exclusively when PIR motion is detected, ensuring efficient use of storage and battery power.
*   **Sunlight Placement:** For optimal and efficient solar charging, it is crucial to position the camera in an area that receives direct sunlight for a significant portion of the day.
*   **Initial Setup:** For a smooth and successful pairing process, it is recommended to reset the camera when initially connecting it to your phone.

The Doenssi wireless WiFi camera provides unparalleled flexibility, empowering you to monitor your home from virtually anywhere through the intuitive iCSee app on your iOS or Android device. You can also easily share access with family members and friends. Your privacy is paramount, and is protected through robust encrypted storage and transmission technologies, ensuring your footage remains secure.

### Effortless Tape-In Extension Installation

Achieve salon-quality results at home with Moresoo's intuitive design.

**Maxpearl All-in-One Home Waxing Kit**

Achieve salon-smooth skin in the comfort of your own home with the Maxpearl Hair Removal Waxing Kit. This comprehensive set equips you with everything needed for effective and nearly painless hair removal, eliminating the need for costly salon visits.

You'll also find 10 standard waxing sticks, 10 specialized eyebrow waxing sticks, and 10 disposable rubber fingers for hygienic application.

**Versatile Electric Wax Warmer:**

This electric wax warmer offers precise temperature control, ensuring you never burn your skin. Simply plug in the heater, add your wax beads, and set the temperature to maximum. Within 15-25 minutes, your wax will be ready. Once at your desired working temperature, adjust the knob to an intermediate setting to maintain optimal heat. The warmer features three adjustable heat settings: "LOW," "MED," and "HIGH," along with an auto-off function for enhanced safety. Its 17 oz. capacity removable aluminum pot is ample for full-body waxing.

**Gentle Formula for Sensitive Skin:**

The creamy hard wax beads, enriched with coconut oil, are ideal for delicate areas. They are perfect for eyebrows, chin, upper lip, neck, underarms, and bikini lines. This highly flexible wax adheres only to the hair, not the skin, making removal nearly painless and leaving your skin flawlessly smooth.

**Tackling Coarse Hair:**

The jasmine blue hard wax beads are specifically formulated to address stubborn, coarse hair. These powerful beads are effective for removing unwanted hair from the bikini area, chest, back, legs, and virtually anywhere else on the body.

**Easy and Profitable Home Hair Removal:**

Waxing at home with the Maxpearl kit is both simple and cost-effective. As the manufacturer, Maxpearl stands behind its products with a hassle-free, one-year replacement warranty.

**How to Use:**

1.  **Prepare:** Ensure your skin is clean and dry. Pour the desired amount of wax beads into the warmer and set the dial to "MED" or "HIGH." Heat for 10-15 minutes.
2.  **Melt and Test:** Stir occasionally until the wax reaches a thick, honey-like consistency. Lower the setting to "LOW-MED." Test the temperature by applying a small amount to your inner wrist.
3.  **Apply and Remove:** Apply the wax in the direction of hair growth with firm pressure. Allow the wax to harden for 30-40 seconds. Grasp the hardened wax at the end and pull it off in the opposite direction of hair growth.

The accompanying bungee dog leash is engineered to enhance safety and comfort during walks and training. ### Simple Harness Fitting and Adjustment

Achieving a proper fit is paramount for your dog's comfort and the harness's effectiveness. Follow these straightforward steps:

2.  **Put-On:** Gently slide your dog's head through the front opening, ensuring the handle faces upwards and the front panel rests on the chest.

## ICEFANG Tactical Dog Harness: Designed for Performance and Control

The ICEFANG Tactical Dog Harness is engineered for working dogs, training, and everyday adventures. Developed in collaboration with dog trainers, handlers, and pet professionals, this harness prioritizes functionality, durability, and your dog's comfort.

### Key Features:

*   **Robust Construction:**
    *   Crafted from **1050D Nylon with a PU Water-Resistant Coating**.
    *   Lined with **soft, padded, ventilating mesh** for comfort.
    *   Features **alloy metal hardware** and **ABS plastic accessories**.
    *   Utilizes **100% Nylon webbing and thread** for superior strength.

*   **Advanced Buckle System:**
    *   **Two heavy-duty alloy metal buckles** (1000 lb Proof-Load Test) are strategically placed on the shoulder, the primary load-bearing points.
    *   **Two POM buckles** (250 lb Proof-Load Test) secure the belly strap.
    *   All critical joints and load-bearing points are reinforced with **Bartack and X-in-Box stitching** to prevent breakage.

*   **Enhanced Control and Safety:**
    *   **No-Pull Front Leash Clip:** Attaching your leash here redirects your dog's forward motion, lifting their front legs off the ground. This allows for effortless control of pullers and aids in training your dog to walk beside you.
    *   **Rear Leash Clip:** Ideal for dogs that are already well-trained for normal walking.
    *   **Durable Handle:** Sewn securely and generously sized for quick and easy gripping in crowded areas. It also assists in lifting your dog in and out of vehicles.

*   **Hands-Free Carrying Capability (MOLLE System):**
    *   Features **two 1" strips of MOLLE webbing** sewn onto each side.
    *   **MOLLE Panel Sizes:**
        *   Small: 3 x Hook & 2 x Loop
        *   Medium: 4 x Hook & 2 x Loop
        *   Large/X-Large: 5 x Hook & 2 x Loop
    *   This system is compatible with MOLLE/PALS pouches, allowing your dog to carry gear during training, daily walks, or adventure hikes. You can also attach items like dog bowls or water bottles using a D-ring carabiner (not included).

*   **Dog Identification Panels:**
    *   **MOLLE-Style Hook and Loop Panels:**
        *   Three 1" strips of loop panel sewn onto both sides in a MOLLE formation.
        *   **Panel Sizes:**
            *   Small: 3" x 4.5"
            *   Medium: 3" x 6"
            *   Large/X-Large/XX-Large: 3" x 7.5"
    *   **Rear Loop Panel:** One strip of loop panel sewn along the back of the harness, with varying widths by size:
        *   Small: 2"
        *   Medium/Large: 3"
        *   X-Large/XXL: 4"
    *   **Front Chest Loop Panel:** One square loop panel sewn on the front chest:
        *   Small: 2" x 2"
        *   Medium: 2" x 3"
        *   Large/X-Large: 2" x 4"
        *   XX-Large: 3" x 4"
    *   These panels provide ample space to attach patches for identifying your dog.

### Sizing and Care Instructions:

*   **Size Chart:** Please refer to the ICEFANG size chart for accurate fitting.
    *   **Small:** Neck: 14"-18"; Chest: 22"-27"
    *   **Medium:** Neck: 16"-22"; Chest: 25"-31"
    *   **Large:** Neck: 18"-24"; Chest: 28"-35"
    *   **X-Large:** Neck: 20"-28"; Chest: 32"-39"
*   **Important Notes:**
    *   This harness is **not designed for use with a tie-out**.
    *   To prevent fraying, **burn and solidify the end of straps** if necessary.
    *   **Washing:** Hand-wash with mild detergent, rinse thoroughly with clean water, and allow to air dry.

### Design Philosophy:

The ICEFANG harness is the result of extensive collaboration with dog trainers, handlers, law enforcement, dog lovers, veterinary clinics, and pet stores. This close partnership ensures that every design element is practical and meets the real-world needs of customers and their canine companions. New products are rigorously tested by these professionals before production to guarantee optimal performance and user satisfaction. The harness is designed with two individual components and offers **four points of adjustment** (shoulder and chest) for a precise, comfortable, and escape-proof fit, preventing rubbing and chafing.

Its advanced high-sensitivity CMOS sensor ensures clear, steady imagery, even in challenging low-light conditions.

**Enhanced Audio and Versatile Functionality**

A standout feature is the included external stereo microphone, which significantly enhances audio quality by reducing noise and delivering precise stereo sound. This makes the Aasonida camera ideal for recording lectures, speeches, and conferences. Beyond its core video capabilities, the camcorder offers a 3-inch 270-degree rotatable screen, built-in fill light, anti-shake technology, face detection, beauty face enhancement, smile capture, and a self-timer. It also functions as a webcam, supports pause recording, and features an auto power-off function.

**Seamless Connectivity and User-Friendly Design**

The Aasonida camcorder excels in connectivity, serving as a high-quality webcam for streaming on platforms like Facebook, Twitch, and YouTube, as well as for everyday video calls. Its TV output allows for direct playback of recorded videos on a television in high definition. Furthermore, a USB connection enables easy uploading, editing, and sharing of content to a computer. The intuitive pause function allows users to halt and resume recording without creating new files, while the 3-inch flip screen and self-timer facilitate effortless selfies from any angle.

**Extended Recording and Reliable Support**

Designed for portability, this lightweight camcorder comes with two rechargeable batteries, supporting continuous recording even while charging. This ensures you never miss a precious moment.
